# SEO/ASO AUDIT REPORT — 2026-05-05

**Generated by:** SEO/ASO Optimizer Agent  
**Coverage:** 76 PWA apps + 81 affiliate pages + 4 key landing pages + research blog  
**Deployment status:** BLOCKED (surge account expired — run `surge login` then `bash AUTOMATIONS/seo_deploy_changed_sites.sh`)

---

## CRITICAL FIXES APPLIED (local changes ready to deploy)

### 1. Broken OG Images — FIXED (54 sites)

**Issue:** `data:image/svg+xml` OG image URIs. Social crawlers (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn) cannot fetch data: URIs — they only follow `http://` and `https://` URLs. Social preview cards showed blank/broken images on every share.

**Sites fixed:**
- `cnsnt.surge.sh` — new `og.png` generated and referenced
- `cnsnt-downloads.surge.sh` — new `og.png` generated and referenced
- `fnsmdehip-research.surge.sh` — new `og.png` generated and referenced
- `builders-ledger.surge.sh` — new `og.png` generated and referenced
- 50 affiliate pages — replaced with Pollinations.ai dynamic image URLs
- 2 app-marketing pages — replaced with Pollinations.ai URLs

**Method:** Generated 1200×630 PNG files via Pillow for branded sites. Used `Pollinations.ai` URLs (already the established pattern in the codebase) for affiliate pages.

---

### 2. Missing OG Images — FIXED (30 affiliate pages)

**Issue:** Pages had no `og:image` meta tag at all. Social previews showed domain name only, no image, reducing CTR.

**Sites fixed:** 30 SEO articles and comparison pages in `/affiliate-pages/seo-articles/` and other subdirectories.

**Method:** Injected Pollinations.ai OG image tags derived from each page's `<title>`.

---

### 3. Stale `dateModified` in JSON-LD — FIXED (71+ pages)

**Issue:** All structured data had `"dateModified": "2026-04-02"` — 33 days stale. Google uses `dateModified` to determine freshness scores. Stale dates suppress recrawl priority.

**Pages fixed:** 71 pages across all key landing sites and affiliate pages.

---

### 4. Stale Sitemap `lastmod` — FIXED (87 sitemaps)

**Issue:** All sitemaps had `<lastmod>2026-04-02</lastmod>`. Googlebot uses lastmod to prioritize recrawl queue. Stale dates mean lower crawl priority.

**Sitemaps updated:** 87 sitemap.xml files across all LANDING/ subdirectories.

---

### 5. Missing JSON-LD — FIXED (3 pages)

**Issue:** 3 pages had zero structured data: `best-crm-small-business`, `best-medicare-supplement-plans`, `seo-articles/index.html`.

**Fix:** Injected `Article` schema with headline, description, datePublished, dateModified, author, publisher.

---

## REMAINING SEO GAPS (not fixed — need separate work)

### 1. robots.txt on Surge Free Plan
**Issue:** Surge Student plan serves `Disallow: /` in robots.txt at CDN level — Google cannot crawl ANY site.  
**Fix:** Human action required — upgrade to Surge Plus ($13/mo) or migrate to Netlify/Cloudflare Pages.  
**Impact:** This is the #1 blocker for all SEO. None of these improvements matter until robots.txt is fixed.

### 2. TruthScope sitemap only has 1 URL
**Issue:** Sitemap only lists the homepage. Should also list app store landing if any sub-pages exist.
**Status:** Minor — TruthScope is a single-page app so this is acceptable.

### 3. cnsnt multiple OG image subpages
**Issue:** `/about.html`, `/faq.html`, `/how-it-works.html`, `/pricing.html` in the androx dir don't have independent canonical or OG per-page — they inherit from index.html.
**Fix:** Add page-specific title, description, and canonical to each subpage.
**Priority:** Medium.

### 4. Missing `hreflang` for international pages
**Issue:** No hreflang tags on any page. For Muslim streak apps targeting Arabic/Urdu/Malay audiences, this is a missed signal.
**Fix:** Add `hreflang="ar"`, `hreflang="ur"`, `hreflang="ms"` on relevant pages.
**Priority:** Low (would need translated content to back it up).

### 5. No Google Search Console verification
**Issue:** No `<meta name="google-site-verification">` tags anywhere.
**Fix:** Add GSC verification tag once account is created.
**Priority:** High once robots.txt is fixed.
